title: adhatoda leptantha
intro: Adhatoda leptantha, also known as Nees' Adhatoda or Vasa, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The leaves of Adhatoda leptantha are known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, the leaves are often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea, and they can also be dried and used as a powder in various herbal preparations.
